{{Quote|This I just do not understand: how can a being who suffered unimaginably for years as a slave turn right around and enslave others?|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Derembus Sitnalta's intelligence report on [[Talas Piran]]|<ref name="air" />}}
[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Derembus Sitnalta''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Alliance Army/Legends|Rebel Alliance Army]].

==Biography==
A veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] in the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Sitnalta served at [[Ruac Outpost]], where he met Sergeant [[Clenna]].<ref name="air" />

A former [[Scout/Legends|scout]], Sitnalta studied in the prestigious [[Twilight Class]] of the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor School of Survival]]. He was essential to save classmate [[Xenon Nnaksta]]'s life from a [[tripion]] attack during the final test.<ref name="air" />

Afterward, like most of his classmates, he joined [[Eclipse Team]], a special unit of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He was the heavy weapons crewer for [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit [[Midnight Squadron]]. An aged human during this time, he rejected command positions, being an "elder statesman" and a veteran non-officer; however, he accepted a job in the Rebel Alliance [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]], and the unofficial designation of [[Commander/Legends|commander]].<ref name="air" />

Alongside former classmate [[Ma'w'shiye]], Sitnalta trained Rebel recruits in the use of high-powered blasters.<ref name="air" />

An associate of Rebel Lieutenant [[Alton Lochner]] and [[Sasnak Toxis]], Sitnalta visited [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] and then noticed slavers [[Chordak]] and [[Talas Piran]] dealing with their stock. Sasnak noticed that one of the slaves was a person he knew, and he had disliked Chordak for a time. The event became a fight until the prefect arrived; the Rebels ran away and the slaves were freed. Due to this, Piran kept a grudge towards those three Rebels, or so Sitnalta thought.<ref name="air" />

As a member of the Task Force, Sitnalta wrote reports on different threats he was familiar with, including GOSS headmaster [[Barosa Warren]]'s slugthrower and Warren's associate [[Clenna]]. He also wrote on [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One's]] droid [[HN-TR1]], which he considered more dangerous than [[IG-88B|IG-88]], and about Talas Piran — Sitnalta was surprised when, researching on Piran, he discovered that Piran had been a slave.<ref name="air" />
